features.featureTitle: Search the entire frontend codebase for any string literal, default value, placeholder text, sample data, or comment that contains the name 'Marina Vasquez' and replace every occurrence with 'Susan Richten'. This includes but is not limited to: CMSContext default/sample data (frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx), HeroEditor defaults (frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor.tsx), Header logo/wordmark (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx), Footer brand name (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx), HTML page title (frontend/index.html), testimonial sample data, press mention sample data, blog post sample data, artwork sample data, any admin page labels, and any other component or file where 'Marina Vasquez' appears as a hardcoded string.
